name: Gf Red Beans & Rice New Orleans Style
recipeIngredient: ¼ teaspoon crushed red chili pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a nonstick skillet.
2. Cook garlic, onions, green pepper, and celery, stirring often, for about 5 minutes or until the onions are translucent.
3. Stir in seasonings, pour in stock.
4. With a fork, crush about one-third of the beans.
5. Add to skillet along with ham, stir well.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
7. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 20 minutes or until thickened.
8. Spoon over rice. Garnish with parsley.
